risk_description: Public benchmark datasets are misused as commercial training foundation
mitigation: Use public data for benchmarking and pretraining only and document provenance

risk_description: Session quality is too poor for reliable assessment in pilot sites
mitigation: Implement capture QC staff training and site qualification

risk_description: Claims drift beyond frozen intended use
mitigation: Formal labeling review and approval before any external material

risk_description: Home monitoring produces alerts before baseline is mature
mitigation: Require baseline completeness and coverage gating

risk_description: Pilot does not convert into paid provider deployment
mitigation: Track workflow value and economic evidence during pilot
